notes: Implemented full table_formatter package with CSV reading, Markdown table output, column type detection (numeric right-aligned, text left-aligned), Unicode/CJK wide character support via unicodedata.east_asian_width, cell truncation with U+2026 ellipsis, and CLI with --sort, --sort-desc, --filter, --output, --max-width flags. All 10 provided tests pass plus 55 additional tests (45 new) covering unit and integration paths.
